meta.title: soph

source.publication: Section 4: Roots, Prefixes, Suffixes and Foreign Words (owner-supplied reference)
source.usage_note: Personal study only. Root, words and meanings transcribed faithfully from the source PDF; a small number of well-attested real words on the same root are included where the source list was too short to form a complete family (4 to 8 members). Parts, glosses, context sentences, mentor note, attempt and construct options are the teaching layer, authored for the Language Garden (LANGUAGE_GARDEN_BIBLE §10).

meta.reviewer_notes: Batch 2: transcribed from the owner's roots (Greek and Latin) reference; 2 taught, 2 reach.

root.label: soph
root.mentor_note: soph promises wisdom, though one member of this family uses that promise to flatter, not inform.

attempt.direction_prompt: A simple, plain way of living, or a complex and worldly one?

context_sentences: The system looked simple on screen, but the sophisticated engineering behind it had taken three years.
Her tastes had grown far more sophisticated since the years when any coffee at all felt like a treat.
His philosophy held that a comfortable answer was usually the wrong one.
The department’s philosophy of teaching changed completely under its new, more demanding chair.
The lawyer was a brilliant sophist, capable of arguing either side of a case with equal conviction.
Critics dismissed him as a sophist whose arguments sounded clever right up until you checked the facts.

construct_options.text: Someone who argues cleverly but misleadingly to win, rather than to find the truth
Someone widely respected as the wisest person in a field
Someone who studies philosophy purely for the love of it

context_sentences: The board saw through the sophistry within minutes and rejected the proposal outright.
What the defence offered was pure sophistry, technically consistent but designed to mislead the jury.

construct_options.text: Clever but false or misleading argument, meant to deceive
A field of study devoted to the pursuit of wisdom
Argument that is careful, honest, and easy to follow
